meta.incident: PostgreSQL deadlock storm on listings table: slow queries escalate -> concurrent UPDATE deadlocks -> connection pool blocked -> 503s from H18/H13 router errors -> dyno SIGKILL (R14 memory quota exceeded) and crash (H10); recurring memory quota warnings as distractor

ground_truth.desc: query latency rising past 200ms threshold before deadlocks started
concurrent UPDATE transactions deadlocking on listings table

ground_truth.needle: connection pool blocked: all 10 connections waiting on locks
ground_truth.desc: all pool connections stuck behind lock waiters

ground_truth.needle: state changed from up to crashed
ground_truth.desc: dyno killed by OOM after memory exhaustion from held connections
recurring benign memory warning distractor preceding the crash

context_loss: state changed from up to crashed
